title: Tainstvennyy ostrov
writer: Mikhail Kalinin, Boris Shelontsev, Jules Verne
actors: Aleksey Krasnopolsky, Pavel Kiyansky, A. Andriyenko-Zemskov
plot: Based on Verne's book The Mysterious Island, five POWs escape from a camp in a balloon during the Civil War and crash-land on an uninhabited island in the Pacific. Trying to settle with their lives they find someone is helping them.
